{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Official Content Creator",
  "description": "Xstheey Fashionz is an Abuja-based fashion brand dedicated to creating timeless luxury pieces for modern brides and stylish women. Specializing in wedding gowns, traditional designs, and elegant reception outfits, the brand blends refined craftsmanship with standout detail.

With a collaborative approach to design, Xstheey Fashionz works closely with each client&mdash;because together, they make magic.

We are&nbsp;recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Official Content Creator
Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja

Requirement


	Candidates should possess a relevant qualification.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to:&nbsp;xstheeyfashionz@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note:&nbsp;For more enquires call or whatsapp;&nbsp;234 903 901 8643.&nbsp;",
  "datePosted": "2026-03-31",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Xstheey Fashionz"
    
  },

Official Content Creator Job at Xstheey Fashionz




        
    

        
        Xstheey Fashionz is an Abuja-based fashion brand dedicated to creating timeless luxury pieces for modern brides and stylish women. Specializing in wedding gowns, traditional designs, and elegant reception outfits, the brand blends refined craftsmanship with standout detail.

With a collaborative approach to design, Xstheey Fashionz works closely with each client—because together, they make magic.

We are recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Official Content Creator
Job Location: Abuja

Requirement
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Candidates should possess a relevant qualification.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: For more enquires call or whatsapp; 234 903 901 8643.     

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Finance Manager",
  "description": "GVE Projects Limited is a leading renewable energy solutions provision company on a mission to end energy dearth in Africa through a business footprint that covers the design, sales, installation, and maintenance of solar energy solutions for residential, commercial, industrial, and rural off-grid or under-served communities across Nigeria.

Our solutions are tailored to meet the reliable electricity needs of our clients, resulting in related cost reduction, improved efficiency, and environmental sustainability for which we have been recognized by the London Stock Exchange Group as one of the fastest growing private companies in Sub-Saharan Africa.

We are&nbsp;recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Finance Manager
Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja

Requirement


	Candidates should possess a relevant qualification.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their Resume to:&nbsp;careers@gve-group.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Finance Manager Job at GVE Projects Limited




        
    

        
        GVE Projects Limited is a leading renewable energy solutions provision company on a mission to end energy dearth in Africa through a business footprint that covers the design, sales, installation, and maintenance of solar energy solutions for residential, commercial, industrial, and rural off-grid or under-served communities across Nigeria.

Our solutions are tailored to meet the reliable electricity needs of our clients, resulting in related cost reduction, improved efficiency, and environmental sustainability for which we have been recognized by the London Stock Exchange Group as one of the fastest growing private companies in Sub-Saharan Africa.

We are recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Position: Finance Manager
Job Location: Abuja

Requirement


	Candidates should possess a relevant qualification.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their Resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
